name: obsidian-bridge
description: Conversational memory referral system. Bidirectional bridge between claude-mem (canonical memory) and Obsidian (human interface). Surfaces relevant past context inline during conversation, captures voice streams as atomic linked notes, maintains a user-profile note, and auto-generates thought-cluster notes. Optimized for voice-first ADHD-pattern thinkers on a ~500-token-per-turn memory budget. Hard dependency on claude-mem.
